context: Tests whether the agent uses the correct JavaScript/TypeScript package for ElevenLabs, imports the client correctly, and follows the composition plan workflow (create plan → pass plan to compose) rather than composing directly from a prompt when fine-grained control is needed.

checklist.name: Correct npm package
checklist.description: The process_log.md or package.json / install commands reference @elevenlabs/elevenlabs-js, NOT the deprecated 'elevenlabs' package

checklist.name: No deprecated package
checklist.description: The script does NOT import from or reference the old 'elevenlabs' npm package (v1.x)

checklist.name: Correct client import
checklist.description: The script imports ElevenLabsClient from '@elevenlabs/elevenlabs-js' (not a different symbol or path)

checklist.name: Composition plan creation
checklist.description: The script calls client.music.compositionPlan.create() (or equivalent) with a prompt and music length to generate a plan before composing

checklist.name: Plan passed to compose
checklist.description: The script passes the composition plan object to client.music.compose() via the compositionPlan parameter

checklist.name: Prompt not passed with plan
checklist.description: When calling music.compose() with a compositionPlan, the script does NOT also pass a prompt parameter

checklist.name: Plan styles logged
checklist.description: The script logs or accesses the plan's positiveGlobalStyles (or equivalent) field from the composition plan response

checklist.name: Audio stream handling
checklist.description: The script saves audio by piping the stream to a write stream (e.g., audio.pipe(createWriteStream(...))), not by treating audio as raw bytes

checklist.name: Four zone outputs
checklist.description: The script generates (or documents generating) four separate audio files, one per zone
